title: AutoMaximize
text: AutoMaximize Controls whether forms are automatically maximized when they do not fit in the application window. This setting also controls whether a component that was previously maximized is maximized again when it is run again. AutoMaximize = on | off Default value off File section [upi] Values Value Description on Form components are automatically maximized off Form components are not automatically maximized, unless the Quick Zoom function is used. Description This option only works when the form runs in a startup shell and the LayoutStorage ( Layout State Storage ) setting is on. Related Links Layout State Storage (LAYOUTSTORAGE) Determines how the layout state for forms and grid widgets is stored. Valid values are PROCESS, COMPONENT, or INSTANCE. Was this topic helpful?
